titles.JP: パーティー・ウィズ・アイリス

sequence: 「今天，是一个特殊的日子。」
「一个，值得纪念的日子。」

开幕之前.say: 鸢尾的同胞们，请汇报各自的工作进度。
宾客通道的安保工作已经布置到位了，正在进行二次核查。
啊……我这边也是，其它的……听候差遣。
舞蹈组最后一次带妆彩排也结束啦~
开幕之前.actorName: 埃米尔·贝尔汀 [芬芳的舞姬]

开幕之前.say: 乐团这边也已经调试好了设备，稍后乐手们将陆续入场。
食物和饮品部分也没问题，其中……
拉·加利索尼埃……你怎么就自己先喝起来了。
宾客们不是还没到场吗，我先帮她们试试口感啦~
开幕之前.actorName: 拉·加利索尼埃 [黑猫与南瓜之夜]

开幕之前.say: 也许在原本的计划中，只是对于一个特殊日子的简单纪念，但在不知不觉间——
在众人的期许下，各种饱含美好愿望的意见被不断地提出——
最后汇聚成了今天这场盛大的庆典。
各位辛苦了，请回到各自的岗位上，做好最后的准备工作。
今天的宴会至关重要，切勿辱没鸢尾之名。
一段时间后的准备室——
嗯……虽然进度有些紧张，但总体还是在顺利的推进。
指挥官才是，辛苦了。
如果说有谁能够协调好不同阵营宾客的相关事宜，对我们的准备进行指导工作。
非指挥官莫属了。
有了您的帮助，相信今天这场邀请了各个阵营的盛大宴会一定能取得圆满成功。
我也很荣幸能为今天这个重要的日子贡献自己的力量。
贞德，你那边的检查完成了么？
嗯，保证万无一失。宴会随时可以开始。
辛苦了。那指挥官，我们这边已经准备就绪了。
再次向您表示感谢，希望您在宴会上玩的开心。
嗯，也期待黎塞留的礼服与精彩致辞。
呵呵~这部分的话，也许会与您想象中有一些出入。
我因宴会的统筹工作而分身乏术，所以部分工作，我交给了另一个人。
相信不久之后您就会知道了。
克莱蒙梭，会场和指挥官也拜托你了。虽然你不喜欢抛头露脸，但今天的我实在是分身乏术。
自然。今天这样重要的日子，如果我依然藏于幕后可是有损鸢尾的礼节的。
指挥官请随我来，是时候让您返回宴会厅享受作为一名宾客的时光了~

sequence: 鸢尾芳馨弥漫时  致辞的准备

致辞的准备.say: 宴会还未正式开始，稍微留意下会场内外吧。
那边正在交谈的二人是……
嗯……需要留意的事项……我知道了。
原本以为是黎塞留在负责这些事，但没想到会是你，稍微有些令人意外。
呵呵~幕后的人偶尔也是需要走到台前来的。
白鹰的致辞环节，就拜托你了。
明白，请放心吧，克莱蒙梭女士。
那么，我这边就先……嗯？指挥官？
噢~指挥官，你也已经到了啊。
打扰到你们的谈话了吗？
哪里的话，我们的谈话刚结束，指挥官出现的恰到好处哦。
距离宴会正式开始还有一些时间，我会让人单独先拿些饮品来，两位慢聊~
请问，指挥官，你在来的路上有没有看到埃塞克斯和马萨诸塞？
好像没有，你们走散了么？
没有，只是稍微有些在意她们。
埃塞克斯在帮我换完礼服后就莫名其妙消失了。
马萨诸塞也一样，在换完礼服后就颇有兴致的离开了。
倒不是担心她们会出什么危险，毕竟是在会场之中。
只不过……算了，随她们去吧。
指挥官，请问你现在有时间么？
我有件事情想听一听你的看法。
当然。不过企业在现在，在这种场合下想听的看法……
……指挥官，觉得我这一身礼服怎么样？
是这样么……太好了。
平时没什么机会穿这样的衣服，稍微有些没自信。
你能喜欢真是太好了。
刚才在来的时候，好像听克莱蒙梭提到了致辞。
嗯，毕竟今天不是单纯的宴会，而是整个庆典的一部分。
所以会有我代表白鹰进行致辞的环节。
原来如此，需要帮忙么？
演讲稿本身我已经写完了，不过……
嗯，指挥官如果不介意的话，能帮我检查一下细节就更好了。
当然没问题，只是，在这纷乱的会场中似乎有些静不下心来。
确实如此……那么指挥官，我们去找一间空屋子吧。
与企业一同，暂时离开了宴会的会场——

sequence: 鸢尾芳馨弥漫时  酒过三巡

酒过三巡.say: 宴会还未正式开始，稍微留意下会场内外吧。
能感受到附近有一股炽热的视线，稍微有些在意……
顺着感觉看过去，视线的发射者似乎并未意识到自己已经被发现了。
企业前辈…这套礼服，真的很适合啊。
嘿嘿……嘿嘿嘿…………吨吨吨~
埃塞克斯正在一边暗中观察远处身着礼服的企业，一边进行着红酒畅饮行为。
赢不了的吧……那种等级……吨吨吨~——
埃塞克斯，你……在做什么？
指、指挥官！你……你怎么来这么早？！
刚刚我说的话……你都听见了？
忘掉……快忘掉…………
没听见么……咦，我……刚刚说了什么来着……
（看来埃塞克斯现在并不是很清醒，需要多留意一下她）
埃塞克斯努力克制着醉意，睁大眼睛，仔细打量着我的礼服。
这么一看……指挥官的礼服……也……也很不错呢。
……很适合你……要来先喝一点么？
……你喝太多了。要我扶你去找企业么？
我……我还没有穿礼服啦，现在过去的话……不行的……
呜呜呜……你知道么，指挥官。
其实……企业前辈的礼服，是我帮忙换上的。
毕竟企业前辈不擅长这种事情嘛……
换装的时候，企业前辈，还有些害羞……欸嘿嘿嘿~
然后，我就看到了……哇…………
你懂么，指挥官！
（砰——）埃塞克斯猛然放下瓶子，直直的盯了过来。
懂……什么？
我看你是完全不懂哦……！
当时我一看到企业前辈就觉得……啊，不用再穿礼服了……
已经输了啊……比不过的……
好像大概明白了埃塞克斯消沉的原因。
不知道等到酒醒之后她会害羞到什么程度……
还是在她做出进一步行动之前先安慰她一下吧。
你可是埃塞克斯，未战先怯可不是你的风格！
而且我也很期待能看到你身着礼服的样子。
……！对，对哦，我可是埃塞克斯……
礼服对决……即是对手是企业前辈我也不会认输。
而且……指挥官也说了……期待我的礼服……
看起来埃塞克斯稍微清醒了一些，但不多。
事……事不宜迟，指挥官，走，跟我回房间……
……回房间，做什么？
我看你是完全不懂哦……！
嘿……嘿嘿，既然你说了“期待”，那当然要……好好回应你的期待了。
……所以第一步就是先回房间，拿礼服！
抵抗是徒劳的。
就这样，被埃塞克斯强行架离了会场——

sequence: 鸢尾芳馨弥漫时  意外的颠簸

意外的颠簸.say: 宴会还未正式开始，稍微留意下会场内外吧。
就在这么想的时候。
“咔——”的一声突然出现，随后是各种东西翻滚掉落的声音。
看来发生了什么事故……？！
大事不好了！武藏大人，后面载着我们行李的马车发生了颠簸，我们的行李……
哇呀——怎么办，行李全部散落一地了！
莫要慌张，人没事就好，至于散落的行李……
哦呀，原来是指挥官。
在我们遇到困难的时候出现，也是缘分的一种。
那就恭敬不如从命，有劳您了。
与武藏一行人一同整理了散落的行李。
呼~多亏了指挥官帮忙，我们才能这么快收拾完。
指挥官，您辛苦了，得再次向您表示感谢才是——
啊——！！怎么会这样！
发生什么事了，若月？！
武藏大人的……武藏大人的礼服……
偏偏是武藏大人今天要穿的礼服……弄脏了……
诶诶？那件超——厉害的礼服弄脏了！？
怎么办……宴会……不久后就要正式开始了吧……
嗯……还好，礼服并未脏污到严重的程度。
只是这些污渍的话，宴会前能清理干净吗？
唔……礼服的材质……需要小心清理……再算上烘干的时间……
我加把劲的话，但勉强能赶得上……！
那礼服就拜托你了，若月。
武藏大人，我去通知鸢尾那边关于抵达时间的变动！
黎塞留那边还是由我来亲自联络吧。
虽是意外事故，但终究影响到了预定安排，得亲自致以歉意才是。
遵命，武藏大人！
呵呵~指挥官就不要跟着起哄了。
也许是因为指挥官在我身边，我才能这么从容哦？
嗯……距离宴会开始还有一段时间。
指挥官，稍后有空闲时间么？
您在危机之时出手搭救之事，我想好好答谢一下————

sequence: 鸢尾芳馨弥漫时  躲避于角落之中

躲避于角落之中.say: 宴会还未正式开始，稍微留意下会场内外吧。
那是让·巴尔？她正在大厅的一角，似乎在思考什么。
她好像注意到我了？
……嗯？为什么立刻扭头过去，眼神还在闪躲。
稍微有些放心不下，还是去看一下吧。
啧，还是被发现了……
你……在躲着我？
抱歉了啊，指挥官。我并没有刻意躲着你……
只是希望我能不被别人注意到。
毕竟……指挥官是很容易聚焦他人目光的类型呢。
总而言之，来特意找我这个躲在角落里的人有什么事么？
回忆起刚才让·巴尔闪躲的目光——
那还真是……多谢。
哈啊？！今天是鸢尾主办的宴会，在会场里最不可疑的就是我了吧！
大概……
还有，礼服，很适合你。
……连你也这么说。
姐姐也说了一样的话，看来不只是单纯的恭维呢。
……感觉让·巴尔似乎非常不开心。
不……鸢尾为今天这场庆典准备了许久，我可是真心为这场宴会感到开心的。
我只是单纯感到十分郁闷。
我怎么想都没想到，姐姐居然要我——
指挥官，打扰了……
请问，有看到埃塞克斯么？
我跟她一起来的，然后……走散了。
啊……让·巴尔，好久不见。
马萨诸塞……
哇，你的礼服，很适合你呢。
我今天……也穿了礼服哦……让·巴尔觉得怎么样呢？
什么……怎么样？
感想……？
等等！让·巴尔……？！
啊……让·巴尔，逃走了……

sequence: 鸢尾芳馨弥漫时  盛情难却

盛情难却.say: 宴会还未正式开始，稍微留意下会场内外吧。
不远处传来一阵热闹的欢呼声。
哈哈哈哈，虽然烈度不如伏特加，但鸢尾的红酒……别有一番风味！
我赞同你的看法，甘古特同志，выпить до дна（干杯）。
虽然宴会的主人说了让我们自便，但也要注意适量哦。
看来在宴会厅的一角，一场北方联合的小型品酒会正在进行中。
啊，是指挥官啊，Здравствуйте（您好）！
没想到这么快就遇上了啊，Товарищ Офицер（指挥官同志）。
来的路上，阿芙乐尔说了好多次有预感会遇到指挥官同志呢。
啊？我有提到指挥官这么多次吗？
机会难得，指挥官也来品鉴一下鸢尾的红酒吧，给——
鸢尾的红酒，烈度对我们来说可能差点意思，但对指挥官同志来说，应该刚刚好。
指挥官不想喝的话可以直接拒绝哦，没关系的。
说起来，我们连礼服都还没来得及换。
因为刚到会场，甘古特就被空气中的“香味”吸引过来了。
于是就变成了现在的样子……
还好克莱蒙梭小姐非常善解人意，甚至还多送些红酒过来。
阿芙乐尔~明明你也想和指挥官喝的吧~
啊，但也要尊重指挥官的意愿哦。
指挥官……？
不愧是指挥官同志，干脆利落地喝下去了。
哟~同志你的杯子空了哦，这样可不行。
嘿嘿，满上了~
请吧，指挥官同志~
不用担心，阿芙乐尔同志，你看指挥官同志也乐在其中不是吗？
不愧是指挥官同志，根本难不倒你~再来！
声音和画面，似乎……正在远去……
到底喝了多少……已经记不清了……
到此为止了，指挥官已经开始有些不清醒了。
阿芙乐尔同志的表情，好严肃……看来没办法了~
指挥官同志今天已经表现得非常豪爽了，差不多也可以结束了。
指挥官？指挥官？您的身体没问题吗？
水？指挥官您想喝点水？啊，还好我带了那个——请用！
阿芙乐尔取下腰带上的水壶，递了过来。
指挥官同志……瞬间倒下去了呢……
指挥官！指挥官！您怎么了！
（嗅嗅）阿芙乐尔同志……你的水壶里……是生命之水（spirytus）吧……

sequence: 鸢尾芳馨弥漫时  会场中心的墙

会场中心的墙.say: 宴会还未正式开始，稍微留意下会场内外吧。
……嗯？有消息？
发送者是……欧根亲王？
短信附带了一张照片。照片中是正在一起参加娱乐活动的铁血一行人。
不过更令人在意的是信息的内容……
以及那个本应该出现在照片中的人。
宴会厅中，俾斯麦正坐在中心区域独饮。
随着宾客逐渐入场，会场的气氛逐渐变得热烈起来。
但俾斯麦身边好像始终有一堵无形的墙壁，隔绝着外界的喧嚣。
偶尔见到几个想上前与她攀谈的人，也因为这堵墙而萌生了退意。
必须得做点什么————
嗯？是指挥官啊，你好。
俾斯麦，你有没有时间……
你的表情在告诉我，你是有什么事情要找我谈吧。
现在我有时间，我们可以开始谈了。
已经完全理解那堵无形之墙形成的原因了——
轻松的……宴会？
嗯……对于大多数普通宾客来说，宴会可能确实如此。
但，我总是无法融入这种氛围呢。
欧根就不一样了，她总是能在各种场合找到乐子。
所以你才让欧根亲王带着同伴们四处游览啊。
指挥官你看到欧根她们了啊，她们玩的开心么？
应该很开心吧，如果你也在的话就更好了。
我并不是那种在宴会上能放松下来的人。
如果我在场的话，她们会感到拘束的。
所以我发出了“都跟欧根去玩吧”的命令。
看来我的判断是正确的呢。
可是这样的话，你要怎么享受宴会的快乐？
宴会与宴会亦有区别。
有些是为了享受快乐，有些则是需要全神贯注。
今天这场宴会的话，我判断为后者。
虽然铁血的诸位听你的命令出去玩了，但她们其实都在担心你。
是欧根让你来的吧？
真是瞒不过你。
所以，为了不让她们担心，你也请享受这场宴会，如何？
舞池那边，已经开始奏乐了呢。
指挥官，如果不嫌弃的话————
握住了俾斯麦伸出的手。
呵呵，感谢你接受邀请，那就让我们试着享受庆典吧~

sequence: 鸢尾芳馨弥漫时  平凡的女王

平凡的女王.say: 宴会还未正式开始，稍微留意下会场内外吧。
陛下，请小心。
平凡的女王.actorName: 天狼星 [纯白蔷薇]

平凡的女王.say: 不远处的天狼星突然将伊丽莎白护在怀里，警惕了起来。
不必紧张，天狼星，会场里很安全。
平凡的女王.actorName: 贝尔法斯特 [优雅而高贵的从者]

平凡的女王.say: 嗯——嗯!
平凡的女王.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

平凡的女王.say: 啊，我的女王陛下！
平凡的女王.actorName: 天狼星 [纯白蔷薇]

平凡的女王.say: 咳——咳！天狼星，你差点闷死本王，你这对碍事的——（盯）
平凡的女王.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]
伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

平凡的女王.say: 抱歉，陛下，请原谅我的僭越。
平凡的女王.actorName: 天狼星 [纯白蔷薇]

平凡的女王.say: ……这是在做什么？
是指挥官啊。
平凡的女王.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

平凡的女王.say: 没什么，就是天狼星有点担心过度而已。
平凡的女王.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

平凡的女王.say: 正好，既然在这里遇上了，就陪本王走走吧。
平凡的女王.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

平凡的女王.say: 很好。
平凡的女王.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

平凡的女王.say: 没有但是，天底下哪有比陪本王更重要的事？
平凡的女王.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

平凡的女王.say: 看来没办法拒绝……
陛下，可以允许我去为二位准备饮品么？
平凡的女王.actorName: 贝尔法斯特 [优雅而高贵的从者]

平凡的女王.say: 嗯，麻烦了，贝法。
平凡的女王.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

平凡的女王.say: 还有天狼星，你也跟贝法一起去吧
平凡的女王.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

平凡的女王.say: 可是，陛下……
平凡的女王.actorName: 天狼星 [纯白蔷薇]

平凡的女王.say: 不用担心，会场很安全，况且谢菲也在暗处看呢。
平凡的女王.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

平凡的女王.say: 遵命，我明白了！
平凡的女王.actorName: 天狼星 [纯白蔷薇]

平凡的女王.say: 那么陛下，可否允许我去准备一些茶点来。
平凡的女王.actorName: 天狼星 [纯白蔷薇]

平凡的女王.say: 距离晚餐时间还有一段时间，我担心……
平凡的女王.actorName: 天狼星 [纯白蔷薇]

平凡的女王.say: 啊，这个就不必了。会场有冷盘，今天难得看看鸢尾的手艺，女仆队就不用麻烦了。
平凡的女王.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

平凡的女王.say: 女仆队走后，与伊丽莎白一同在城堡中闲逛着。
唔嗯……这鸢尾主办的庆典，看上去也像那么回事。
平凡的女王.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

平凡的女王.say: 差不多已经能有皇家八成的水准了！
平凡的女王.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

平凡的女王.say: 看来今天也是伊丽莎白嘴上不饶人的一天。
本王已经很客气了。
平凡的女王.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

平凡的女王.say: 你看到那边的挂画了么，如果是本王，肯定在这里放上——
平凡的女王.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

平凡的女王.say: 闲逛之中，伊丽莎白时而手舞足蹈，时而指指点点，感觉比平时还要活跃。
不过在难得停下来之后，却会露出若有所思的表情。
伊丽莎白，特意把女仆队支开，是有什么要说的事么？
没。就算有要说的事，本王也不需要特意支开女仆队啊。
平凡的女王.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

平凡的女王.say: 还是说，你想吃天狼星的甜点？那本王可以把她叫回来。
平凡的女王.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

平凡的女王.say: 那倒也不必这么麻烦……不过疑问还是没有得到解答。
唉……一定要本王说得那么清楚么。
平凡的女王.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

平凡的女王.say: 你看周围，从进入会场到现在周围人来人往……
平凡的女王.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

平凡的女王.say: 但，有第二个像本王一样带着一群侍从的人么？
平凡的女王.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

平凡的女王.say: 就算是这次身为主办方的黎塞留都没有，你这个指挥官当然也没有。
平凡的女王.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

平凡的女王.say: 所以算是……体会平凡吧。
平凡的女王.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

平凡的女王.say: 就算只有短暂片刻也好。
平凡的女王.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

平凡的女王.say: 一个平凡的少女来到一座巨大的城堡……
平凡的女王.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

平凡的女王.say: 身边只有你一个人就够了，不行么？
平凡的女王.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

平凡的女王.say: 也不是不行，只是稍微有些意外。
意外本王会有这一面？
平凡的女王.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

平凡的女王.say: 这当然不是唯一的原因，但也不是完全没有这个原因。
平凡的女王.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

平凡的女王.say: 你要是完全当成玩笑话，本王会生气的。
平凡的女王.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

平凡的女王.say: 本王生气的话，后果可是很严重的哦。
平凡的女王.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

平凡的女王.say: 哼，不要用嘴说，实际表现呢？
平凡的女王.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

平凡的女王.say: 贝法总是要把饮料拿回来的。
平凡的女王.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

平凡的女王.say: 趁着这段时间，好好让本王满意吧~
平凡的女王.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

平凡的女王.say: ……反正现在周围没人？！
平凡的女王.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

平凡的女王.say: 没人本王就打不过你么？！
平凡的女王.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

平凡的女王.say: 打指挥官，后果也很严重。
而且闹起来的话，平凡的气息就烟消云散了。
这倒是在理……
平凡的女王.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

平凡的女王.say: 不过你既然意识到了，那就不要停在这发呆了！
平凡的女王.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

平凡的女王.say: 贝法总是要把饮料拿回来的。
平凡的女王.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

平凡的女王.say: 趁着这段时间，好好与本王一同享受平凡吧~
平凡的女王.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

sequence: 「就这样，宴会的氛围进入了高潮——」

为此刻而欢庆.say: 本王……见不到你会不高兴的……
伊丽莎白，这种时候要再坦率一些吧~
指挥官，你能感受到今天会场热烈的氛围吗？
我很享受这种氛围，希望你也一样。
今天若招待不周，还请多多包涵。呃——
不像是能从我嘴里说出来的话……不过……
今天能招待你，我真的很开心，请好好享受接下来的庆典。
指挥官，庆典的氛围，逐渐热烈起来了呢。
但这还不是最高潮，之后还会有更多有意思的活动哦~
指挥官，不管是过去还是现在，你都一直陪伴在我们身边，指引着我们航行的方向。
未来的航线……也请你继续指引我们，与我们一同向着更美好的未来进发吧。

sequence: 鸢尾芳馨弥漫时  礼服与作战服

礼服与作战服.say: 一段时间后的休息室————
听了我的致辞，指挥官觉得怎么样？
条理清晰，逻辑严谨，宣读流畅，是一份非常不错的致辞。
嗯，我也是这么认为的，如果是作为战场上的致辞的话……
不过我有些拿不准，这样的内容会不会太严肃了，不适合宴会上轻松的氛围。
严肃和正式，还是有一些区别的。
今天的宴会不仅是为了放松，同时也是一场正式庆典的一部分，不是么？
确实如此……指挥官这么说的话我就安心了。
况且，宴会……未必就不会转变为战场。
……嗯？没想到指挥官居然也这么说。
嗯，刚刚新泽西也说了类似的话，宴会变成战场什么的……
是在比喻社交场合的凶险么？
……我是，不过我保证新泽西绝对不是这个意思。
社交场合的事……很复杂呢。
不过既然是战场，那我就应该打起精神来认真对待了。
嗯……没想到身上穿的礼服竟会变为作战服，不好好适应一下可不行……
本来想安慰一下企业，没想到意外激起了她的斗志。
然后……
……上战场的话，也要有指挥官才行。
指挥官，接下来的战斗，能与我并肩作战么？
在这名为宴会的战场之上。
嗯，荣幸之至——

sequence: 鸢尾芳馨弥漫时  微醺的胜负心

微醺的胜负心.say: 黑暗的房间中，传来织物们的摩擦声，还有……
指……指挥官，再稍微等我一下，现在还不能回头哦。
嘿咻……没想到，一个人穿礼服……这么麻烦……
啊啊！掉了！真是的……
可以了哦……指挥官。
请……看着我……
怎……怎么样？
指挥官的评价呢？
哦哦，真的吗？指挥官？
等等……什么叫做“不一定会输”啊？！
什、什么叫“也”嘛，这种微妙的回答！
真是的……就不能好好的说很漂亮啊、被迷住了之类的话么……
埃塞克斯想要起身，但因为某种宴会饮品的副作用，再次倒了下去。
呜……头有点晕，刚刚喝太多了……
欸，为什么礼裙的拖尾要弄得那么长啊……
埃塞克斯似乎已经酒醒了，这么一来就可以放心了。
不过……似乎没有见她喝过任何醒酒的东西……？
那个，指挥官，能扶我一下吗？
轻轻扶住有些站不稳的埃塞克斯。
也许，是应该给她的礼服一个客观的评价……
指~挥~官~实话实说，我这身礼服好看么？
再次感受到了逐渐加重的巨大力道。
诶嘿……嘿嘿……
太好了……指挥官的夸奖真是太好了……
就……就算……对手是企业前辈……埃塞克斯也是不会输的……
但是……嘿嘿……企业前辈的礼服……真的好……美丽……嘿嘿……
指挥官……你也是这么觉得的吧……！
正傻笑着的埃塞克斯缓缓扭头看向我这边。
因为距离的原因，能感觉到红酒的气息，夹杂着果香……
指挥官……怎么回事……今天……特别有魅力……
看来埃塞克斯完全没有醒酒……
可不能让现在的她这样出现在宴会上。
没办法……直到清醒之前，再照顾她一段时间吧——

sequence: 鸢尾芳馨弥漫时  好孩子的奖励

好孩子的奖励.say: 在武藏的邀请下，来到城堡附近的湖面泛舟。
怎么了？指挥官，你的表情~
呵呵……难道是我这身衣装很奇怪吗？
这是……女仆装？
被你看出来了，呵呵~
若月那孩子带来了不少衣装，里面正好有这件呢。
指挥官今天应该是在帮宴会主办方工作吧。
居然连这件事都知道……
凭空猜测而已，毕竟你一直都是个热心肠嘛。
工作了这么久，又来帮我收拾行李，应该累坏了吧？
指挥官还真是充满干劲呢，但是……
在我身边的话，不需要那么勉强也可以哦。
那就靠到我的身边来吧，无需羞怯。
这里是湖水之中的一叶孤舟，没有人能打扰到我们。
指挥官可以不用顾虑，尽情释放身体中积累的疲劳。
嗯？指挥官不说话，是心中仍有挂念之事？
工作倒是早就结束了，只不过……
不需要“只不过”，单纯把工作结束这件事就已经很了不起了哦。
来吧~指挥官~闭上~眼睛。

sequence: 不要紧张，再放松一点~（嗼呋嗼呋❤~）
怎么样？很舒服的吧~呵呵~
感觉到压力释放了吗？（嗼呋嗼呋❤~）
（嗼呋嗼呋❤……嗼呋嗼呋❤……）

好孩子的奖励.say: 感觉度过了一段，短暂、悠然。又漫长的时光——

sequence: 鸢尾芳馨弥漫时  消除恐惧的方法

消除恐惧的方法.say: 被让·巴尔裹挟着来到了城堡中的某处。
呼——到这里的话，应该就安全了……
因为被发现了。
为什么被发现了……就要逃走？
不然呢？
算是吧……不过不是主要原因。
哦，好。
唉……接待贵宾、宴会致辞这些工作听上去哪一个和我沾边了？
虚伪的笑，繁文缛节，再加上像个花瓶一样让人参观……
都跟她说做不来这些了……还是一股脑全推过来，这跟让我出丑有什么区别。
我知道她忙不开，克莱蒙梭也忙不开。
那也不一定非要是我吧……贞德和马赛曲不也可以。
而且做的肯定比我更好……
黎塞留肯定也知道这一点，不过她还是选择了你。
你觉得她是想看你出丑么，还是？
还是她打算扔过来更多工作的预兆，还是因为想让我习惯这种场合。
还是因为我是她的妹妹……黎塞留级战列舰二号舰，让·巴尔。
看来你都明白。
明白归明白，但是……
这样好了，我去跟黎塞留说你身体不适，让她把这件工作交给马赛曲或者圣女贞德——
等等——！
我又没说不干……而且鸢尾骑士岂能出尔反尔临阵退缩……
但是你现在的状态……
嗯……我明白了。
宴会的工作……虽然很让人头疼，但不能让鸢尾蒙羞。
消除恐惧的最好方法就是面对恐惧。
加油——让·巴尔！
哼……不愧是指挥官，还是那么能说会道。
呼——我们回会场去吧，指挥官。
刚刚突然从马萨诸塞面前跑开，此等失礼行为，首先需要对她有个解释才行。
一上来就是这么高难度的目标？
不是你说的么，消除恐惧的最好方法就是面对恐惧。
宴会正在进行中，没有时间让我慢慢习惯了。
嗯，决定了，第一个要接待的客人就是她了。
不过……指挥官，帮人帮到底。
你会陪我一起回去的，对吧？

sequence: 鸢尾芳馨弥漫时  我要保守秘密…
「……不知沉睡了多久……我的任务……唔……」
「……记忆有些紊乱……」
「……昏迷剂的效果……还没消退么……」

我要保守秘密….say: 现场状况我知道了，继续执行任务吧。
再强调一下，带回来的时候，我要的是还能喘气的。
发号施令完后，阿芙乐尔？终于注意到了这边。
你醒啦？比之前预计的时间要早一些呢。
正好，早开工早收工，你也可以早点上路。
说吧，把你知道的都说出来。
嚯？是装作不知道，或者是昏迷剂药效还没过吗？
很经典的回答，我每天都要听到很多次呢。
不过也无所谓，本来也不指望你会乖乖把情报都说出来。
看来得先让你吃点苦头了。
毕竟……坏孩子总是要吃点苦头，才会老老实实的。
快住手，阿芙乐尔！
等等，冷静下来。眼前这位绝对不是我所认识的阿芙乐尔。
当脑海里出现了这个想法之后，周围的一起都黯淡了下去。
世界重新回归到了昏昏沉沉的黑暗中。
哦~居然知道我的名字？看来我们这边出现了内鬼呢~
正好，把内鬼的情报也告诉我，不然……
我绝对不会说出情报的……！
秘密……决不能透露给敌人……！
哦~哦，看来是个硬骨头呢，连我都稍微兴奋起来了~
让我看看你能撑到什么时候~哼哼~
叫吧，再叫大声一些哦，哦呵呵~
指挥官……好像做噩梦了……
嗯……膝枕的腿稍微有些麻了……但是……
为了指挥官的话……
快住手，阿芙乐尔！
……什、什么？
指挥官……你究竟梦到了什么……？

sequence: 鸢尾芳馨弥漫时  偶尔闲暇

偶尔闲暇.say: 在舞池跳了几曲后，顺势与俾斯麦一同在各会场间漫步，时而停留欣赏演出，时而享用美食。
刚才乐队演奏的爵士乐……与平时听惯了的古典音乐相比……
虽然在音律上有一些相似之处，但最后演出的效果却让我感觉耳目一新。
噢~指挥官你拿了些吃的过来啊。
请慢用。希望符合你的口味。
嗯，看上去很美味，谢谢你。
俾斯麦细嚼慢咽地品尝了美食。
嗯~口感绵密，入口即化，像是冰淇淋的感觉，配菜则是很清新的口感。
你看起来已经开始享受宴会的氛围了。
有你在身边陪我，不知不觉间，这场宴会的性质已经变了。
变成可以享受快乐的类型了？
……嗯，变成可以享受快乐的类型了。
以前的宴会上，可没多少机会像今天这样呢。
大多数时候都是需要全神贯注应对的，像是工作一样的东西。
再加上时常插入的紧急联络……
即使在最盛大的宴会中，一旦有新的消息送来也必须立刻开始处理。
……美食和演出，从来都没多少机会好好品味呢。
那今天就品味个够吧，就像一介普通宾客那样。
一介普通宾客吗？这个身份听起来不错。
如果再有紧急消息发来的话，我替你处理。
噗……那就麻烦指挥官了。
是啊……在你面前的话，我就可以稍微放下领导者的重担。
就像一介普通宾客那样，享受一次普通的宴会……
由衷希望你能享受到宴会带来的快乐。
有你在我身边的话，一定会的————

sequence: 鸢尾芳馨弥漫时  为主角干杯

为主角干杯.say: 从洗手间返回会场的走廊上，遇到了一位在此等候的人。
指挥官，这是陛下让我传递给你的信息，请过目。
为主角干杯.actorName: 谢菲尔德 [黑鸦的晚宴]

为主角干杯.say: 从谢菲尔德手中接过了一张精致的卡片。
卡片上是伊丽莎白的留言，希望我绕一下路，并附上了一个房间号。
回过神来，谢菲尔德已经不见了，看来……要自己找过去了。
推开门，一个皇家风格的巨大房间映入眼帘。
仿佛此处不是在鸢尾的城堡，而是来到了皇家的宫殿中。
巨大的房间中央摆着一张餐桌，伊丽莎白正一个人坐在桌前。
指挥官，请，陛下正在等您。
为主角干杯.actorName: 贝尔法斯特 [优雅而高贵的从者]

为主角干杯.say: 好慢啊，仆从！
为主角干杯.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

为主角干杯.say: 这个房间有些难找……没想鸢尾城堡里还有这样的房间。
你是指这个单独定制的私人包间？
为主角干杯.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

为主角干杯.say: 我可是伊丽莎白女王，俾斯麦她们要是想要的话也一样可以有，这种事没什么稀奇的。
为主角干杯.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

为主角干杯.say: 不是说要体验平凡么……？
之前不是已经跟你体验过了？
为主角干杯.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

为主角干杯.say: 伊丽莎白眨了眨眼，然后挥起手来。
来，仆从，坐吧。
为主角干杯.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

为主角干杯.say: 还有肚子么？
为主角干杯.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

为主角干杯.say: ……倒是有，不过这些菜都是女仆队做的？
只有茶是贝法泡的。其他的菜都是后厨直接送过来的，由鸢尾提供。
为主角干杯.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

为主角干杯.say: 所以跟你在会场吃的也没什么两样，不吃也行。
为主角干杯.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

为主角干杯.say: 那就恭敬不如从命。陛下亲自邀请，怎么能拒绝呢。
贝法，给指挥官也上点菜吧。
为主角干杯.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

为主角干杯.say: 坐在伊丽莎白旁边，边品茶，边随便吃着什么。
房间里格外安静，与喧嚣的会场仿佛属于两个世界
不过突然注意到，只有我的杯中是茶，伊丽莎白杯中，似乎是酒。
给你茶是因为，一会回会场里有的你喝的。
为主角干杯.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

为主角干杯.say: 至于本王，偶尔换换口味。
为主角干杯.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

为主角干杯.say: 鸢尾的葡萄酒还是不错的。
为主角干杯.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

为主角干杯.say: 在年份选择上，黎塞留也下了不少心思。
为主角干杯.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

为主角干杯.say: 给不同喜好的人，提供的年份也不同……呵，真心细啊。
为主角干杯.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

为主角干杯.say: 伊丽莎白将杯中的红酒一饮而尽，然后又自己倒了一杯。
这次宴会，鸢尾办的确实不错。
为主角干杯.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

为主角干杯.say: 大到流程小到细节，方方面面都照顾到了。
为主角干杯.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

为主角干杯.say: 你感觉如何，有没有享受到这场庆典？
为主角干杯.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

为主角干杯.say: 嗯，在会场中度过了一段愉快的时光。
那就好……挺好的。
为主角干杯.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

为主角干杯.say: 谈话间，提示音响了一下，收到了一条黎塞留发来的活动邀请。
黎塞留……邀请你去舞池啊。
为主角干杯.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

为主角干杯.say: 那就去吧。
为主角干杯.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

为主角干杯.say: 本王有些喝多了，在这里再休息一下。
为主角干杯.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

为主角干杯.say: 指挥官，这边请。
为主角干杯.actorName: 贝尔法斯特 [优雅而高贵的从者]

为主角干杯.say: 转头向着大门的方向走去，依稀听到背后的莎白说了什么。
今晚的主角属于鸢尾。
为主角干杯.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

为主角干杯.say: 本次……本王就破例，不去抢她们的风头了。
为主角干杯.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

为主角干杯.say: 好好享受庆典哟，指挥官————
为主角干杯.actorName: 伊丽莎白女王 [女王的舞踏会]

明日亦是和平的一日.say: 从进程规划上来说，宴会应该已经接近尾声了。
但现场的热度并没有丝毫的下降，反而愈加——
指挥官同志，看来你还有隐藏的实力啊，来来，выпить до дна（干杯）！
指挥官不用担心，这次我的水壶里，装的是真正的水……大概。
等等，仆——，你可不能被那边勾走了！
指挥官，很受欢迎呢，但看着好像也很辛苦……
武藏大人，我们也快去把指挥官抢过来吧！
鹬蚌相争，渔翁得利。
待到局势再热烈一些，指挥官的防线再瓦解一些，我们再出击也不迟。
不过，等待时机的猎手，好像不只是我们呢……
（微笑着点头致意）
武藏大人，俾斯麦大人向您表示敬意。如果不介意的话，来尝尝我们铁血的啤酒如何？
呼——终于稍微闲下来一些了……
姐姐……要……一起来一杯吗。
……当然，我的妹妹，我非常乐意。
企业……前辈……我还能……
啊，指挥官……也一起来吧……嘿嘿……
埃塞克斯，你到底喝了多少啊……哎……你抱太紧了——
夜晚，海风像是柔软的绸缎般轻抚着脸颊。
纵使来到了室外，会场的欢声笑语似乎仍在耳畔回响。
没想到安慰企业的话一语成谶，宴会此时已经变为了“战场”。
……稍微需要，透一下气。
呼——再过一小会儿，今天，就要结束了。
指挥官也是在这里等待明天的到来吗？
这声音是……克莱蒙梭？
抱歉，我打扰到你了吗？
没打扰到你就好。
（嗅嗅）
看来，指挥官刚刚承受了相当多的“爱戴”呢。
从残留的香水味道上来看，有白鹰的企业的、铁血的俾斯麦的、我们家黎塞留的……
甚至连重樱的武藏大人的都有啊。
要不然也在这里也染上些我的味道如何？
……还请黑衣主教阁下手下留情。
呵呵~开个玩笑。
说起来……你不在宴会上没关系吗？
嗯，毕竟我也不是喜欢抛头露面的人。
比起觥筹交错的宴会，我更喜欢出来吹吹海风。
而且，黎塞留也忙完事情来到会场了，我就算不在也没关系。
……指挥官，请问，你今天的感受如何？
是啊，我也有相同的感受。
平凡。平凡的昨日、平凡的今日、平凡的明日。
在背后支撑着这样一场热闹宴会的——正是我们已经习以为常，又不可或缺的平凡。
不愧是指挥官，感觉我又多了解你一分了~
噢~确实，今天的庆典宴会相当的完美。
让所有与会宾客都得到了充分的享受与乐趣。
能达成这一点，也多亏了您在开幕之前做出的帮助呢。
回答居然是刺激么……看来会场之中，或许发生了些连我都尚未洞悉全貌的事件啊。
不愧是深谙战争艺术的指挥官阁下，感觉我又多了解你一分了。
好了，休息时间结束。该带指挥官阁下返回“战场”了。
……这么快就结束了？
呵呵~其实，这座城堡在建设的时候，我特意加上了密道和暗室的部分。
接下来的时光，绝对不会让你失望的。
让我们一同，尽情享受庆典的尾音吧——

sequence: Today is a special day. A day to be remembered.
And what better way to remember it than with a grand banquet?

The Orthodoxy's Banquet I.say: Everyone, could I get an update on how the preparations are going?
I've finished assigning guards along the guest routes and I'm currently double-checking to see if everything looks good.
Likewise, I've finished my tasks. I'm waiting for my next one.
My dance rehearsal for the partygoers is finished.~
I've set up all the equipment for the orchestra. The players will be here soon.
The food and drinks are coming along well, aside from... her.
La Galissonnière, what are you doing? These drinks are for the guests.
Hey, think of it as taste-testing. Or checking for poison. Either way, it's not like anyone will know.~
The Orthodoxy's Banquet I.actorName: La Galissonnière [Black Cat of All Hallows' Eve]

The Orthodoxy's Banquet I.say: La Galissonnière tries and fails to come up with an excuse, to the chagrin of some and the amusement of others.
The celebration they're preparing now began as a project much smaller in scale.
That was, until everyone – but especially the Iris Orthodoxy – put forth various ideas on how to make it better, bigger.
Now, these girls are all working tirelessly to help make this banquet one of the biggest, most memorable of the year.
Alright, everyone. Please return to your stations and work on all the finishing touches.
Remember that we are hosting this banquet. We cannot let any imperfections sully the Holy Iris' name.
With all their accounts settled, the girls settled down in the waiting room.
Hmm... Although it was a little hectic, this generally went quite well.
Please. If anything, I should be the one saying that.
It was you who assigned tasks to each faction and coordinated our efforts on the scene.
I can't think of anyone else who could've filled your shoes.
I am convinced this banquet will be a great success, largely thanks to you.
While I doubt my part is as important as Richelieu makes it sound, I'm nevertheless glad to have helped everyone.
Jeanne, are we ready?
Yes, we are! Everything is in order for the banquet to begin.
Excellent. Commander, we are ready to open our doors to the guests.
Once again, thank you for everything. I hope you'll enjoy the festivities.
"Thanks. I'm looking forward to hearing your opening speech."
My opening speech? I'm afraid it might not be what you're expecting.
The planning of this banquet required my full attention, so I gave the task of delivering a speech to someone else.
You'll find out who soon enough.
Clemenceau, I leave the Commander and the venue to you. I know you don't like being in the spotlight, but I have no one else to turn to.
Of course. Our good reputation is on the line here – it would be discourteous of me to hide behind the scenes.
Follow me, Commander. It's time to go back to the main hall and enjoy yourself as a guest.~

sequence: The Orthodoxy's Banquet  Enterprise's Speech

Enterprise's Speech.say: As much as I want to check out the venue, I feel that I should have a look around the palace.
Two people are having a chat just down the hall...
That's everything I need to know? Noted.
I'm surprised that you came to tell me that. I was expecting Richelieu.
What can I say? Even I – a known behind-the-scenes schemer – need to take center stage now and again.
Now, I trust you're willing to deliver the Eagle Union's speech, yes?
Yeah. I'm up for it.
Great. Then if you'll excuse me... Oh, if it isn't the Commander.
Didn't see you there, Commander.
"Good evening, you two. I hope I didn't interrupt your conversation."
Not at all. Your timing couldn't have been better, in fact. We just finished our little talk.
Seeing as there's still some time before the banquet officially starts, I'll go on ahead and find some drinks. You two have a good one, now.~
You haven't seen Essex or Massachusetts around, have you? They said they were on the way.
As far as I can tell by Enterprise's expression, she doesn't seem particularly worried about them.
"Can't say I have, no. Do you reckon they've gotten lost?"
Maybe. I helped Essex with her dress, then sometime later she just disappeared on me.
Same with Massachusetts. She put on her dress, I turned around for a minute, and she was gone.
They're obviously SOMEWHERE in the palace, so I don't think they're in danger or anything. It's just...
Ah, forget it. I'm sure they're just doing something to pass the time.
Anyway... Could I have a minute of your time, Commander?
It's nothing important. I just wanted to ask you something.
"Sure, not a problem. What's on your mind?"
It feels weird to just come forth and ask it outright, but... what do you think about my dress?
I expected something else, given how she beat around the bush for a bit. I'm relieved this is all it was.
You really think so?
It took a while to put on, and I rarely ever wear dresses, so I wasn't entirely sure.
Hearing you say it does look good is a big relief.
"Glad to give you some peace of mind. On another subject, what were you and Clemenceau talking about earlier?"
Oh, that. We were discussing a speech for the banquet. It's a big day, after all, so it feels appropriate.
She asked me to deliver it on behalf of the Eagle Union.
"I see. Do you need any help with that?"
Well, the script itself is already finished, so I'm good on that front.
But I'd appreciate it if you could read it through, and maybe offer some feedback too.
"I could do that, no problem. First, though, we should find a place with fewer inquisitive people."
You're right. Someplace quiet would be ideal. Let's go.
And so, Enterprise and I take off, leaving the hall behind.

sequence: The Orthodoxy's Banquet  Drinks, Dresses, and Despair

Drinks, Dresses, and Despair.say: As much as I want to check out the venue, I feel that I should have a look around the palace.
I sense an intense gaze from somewhere nearby.
After a quick look around, I figure out who's watching. She doesn't realize yet that I'm here.
Man... Enterprise sure looks stunning in her dress...
*glug glug*... Pfah!~
It's Essex, gazing at Enterprise from afar. She's admiring her outfit and drinking wine straight from the bottle.
I	's leagues ahead of mine... How am I supposed to impress anyone like thiiis!
"What are you up to, Essex?"
Commander! Wh-wh-what brings you here?
Please don't say you heard me grumbling just now...
Oh god... Please forget it. Push it out of your memory...
You didn't? Phew... Wait, what DID I even say? Uhh...
She's had some drinks – a few too many, possibly. Maybe a little company will get her to take her hand off the bottle?
*stares drunkly*...
She opens her eyes wide and stares at my clothes like I'm a fashion model.
You know, I just realized... You're looking quite stylish, too.
Really rocking that fit... Hey, want some wine?
"No thanks, and I think you've had too much. I'd offer to sit down with you, but I think what you need now is to rest in the lounge."
Heheh, good point... No, wait, I still need to put my dress on! I can't go there yet...
Buhh... That reminds me, I have a fun fact.
Did you know I helped Enterprise put on her dress?
She's bad with dresses, you see, so somebody had to give her a hand...
So I did. It took quite some time, which she felt a little shy about.~
And that, right then, is when I realized! *glug glug*...
Did you realize it too, when you saw her, Commander?!
She forcefully puts her bottle down on the table with an audible thud, then looks at me intently again.
"Realize what? What are you talking about?"
Please. Now you're just playing dumb...
I realized that she had me beaten. There was no topping the beauty of her dress...
So I decided – screw it, why even bother with my own dress...
Now I see the reason why she sounded depressed.
However, she'll probably want to kick herself once she sobers up.
It's best not to let her get any more drunk than she already is.
"It's not like you to give up without a fight."
"And furthermore – I still want to see how you'd look in your own dress."
You... You're right! I shouldn't give up before I've even tried.
This is the battle of the dresses... I won't admit premature defeat, even if I'm up against Enterprise!
Especially not when you're eager to see me all dressed up...
She seems to sober up ever so slightly from her defeatist daze.
Alright... I'll go back to my room immediately and get changed. You should come with me!
"Come again?"
You said you want to see me in a dress, didn't you?
The last thing I want is to dash your expectations, so I need to pick out the best dress possible.
The first step to doing that is to go back to my dorm room, together!
It doesn't seem like there's any chance she'll budge on this.
Left with no other option, I'm forced to leave the venue with her...

sequence: The Orthodoxy's Banquet  Bumpy Road

Bumpy Road.say: As much as I want to check out the venue, I feel that I should have a look around the palace.
Curious about what the Sakura Empire is doing, I decide to go have a look – until a sound interrupts my thoughts.
A loud clanging, like something metallic fell over on the road.
In other words – the sound of an accident.
Bad news, Lady Musashi! Our manjuu carriage toppled on its side!
What do we do? Our luggage is all over the road!
Don't panic. First, check if anybody is hurt, then load the baggage back into the carriage.
Oh, it's you, Commander.
Just as trouble strikes, you appear before us. Perhaps this is fate?
Yes, your help would be much appreciated. Let's fix this little accident.
With everyone working together, we manage to load the luggage back onto the carriage.
Whew... Thanks for the assistance, Commander!
Indeed. You have my gratitude.
Oh! Oh no!
"Oh no" what? What's wrong?
Look what happened to Lady Musashi's banquet dress!
It seems it got dirty whilst we were loading the luggage back up...
Oh dear, that's awful. You can't wear a dirty dress to a banquet.
What do we do... Lady Musashi is meant to appear at the banquet really sooon!
It's not the end of the world. Fortunately, it didn't tear.
A little dirt is nothing we can't fix with some soap and water before I make my entrance.
Right! Of course. Let me see how long it would take to clean and dry the fabric... Hmm...
Not too long, luckily! Allow me to do it!
Very well. If you insist.
Meanwhile, I'll call the banquet staff and inform them you'll arrive a bit later than planned.
You mean calling Richelieu? It's best if I do that myself.
Accident or not, it affects the schedule. The least I can do is personally apologize to her for the delay.
As you say, Lady Musashi!
You really needn't parrot people without reason...
It's truly fortunate you were here, Commander. Without your help, we'd still be lifting luggage.
Now, it'll take a while for Wakatsuki to clean my garb, and I don't wish to stand around idly.
Say, would you lend me a bit of your time?
I wish to repay my debt of gratitude to you for coming to our aid.

sequence: The Orthodoxy's Banquet  Spotlight-Shy

Spotlight-Shy.say: As much as I want to check out the venue, I feel that I should have a look around the palace.
Over there, in a quiet corner of the palace, I spot Jean Bart. She seems lost in thought.
Our eyes lock for a moment. I wait for her to say the first word.
...But she doesn't, and she turns her gaze elsewhere. Maybe she's feeling absentminded?
Whatever the case, I should go over and say hello.
Of course you saw me. Tsk...
An angered look flashes on her face for an instant before she turns away from me.
...Okay, sorry. I'm not avoidin' you on purpose.
It's just that wherever you go, a crowd follows. I don't like the attention.
That's why I'm here, trying to stay low so ya wouldn't find me.
Or was. No point in that anymore. So, what is it?
She explains herself matter-of-factly, still looking away from me.
How considerate of you.
Strangely? The hell ya talking about?
This is our banquet. There's nothin' odd about me being here. At least nothin' I can think of...
"You didn't put on a beautiful dress just to stand in a corner, did you? You should be enjoying yourself. Go talk to people, enjoy a drink or two."
Second time hearing that tonight.
Richelieu said the same thing. Maybe she wasn't just bein' polite.
I grab a drink and pull up a chair beside her. Something tells me she wants somebody to talk to.
...Don't get me wrong – I am enjoyin' myself. The whole Orthodoxy pulled all the stops to organize this thing, and the mood's great.
It's not the banquet itself I'm miffed about, but it's related.
See, Richelieu told me to deliver the Orthodoxy's speech later ton–
Evening, Commander.
You haven't seen Essex around, have you?
We came here together, but we got separated after a while.
M-Massachusetts! Aw, shit...
Long time no see, Jean.
Beautiful dress you have.
Speaking of dresses... Thoughts?
About what?
Um, my dress?
All of a sudden, Jean Bart hooks her arm around mine and escorts me out of the hall.
Huh. She didn't even rate my dress...

sequence: The Orthodoxy's Banquet  A Peculiar Apéritif

A Peculiar Apéritif.say: As much as I want to check out the venue, I feel that I should have a look around the palace.
Suddenly, cheers and lively chatter erupt at a table not far away.
Whew! It totally lacks the kick of vodka, but the Orthodoxy's wine isn't half-bad. It's got good flavor to it!
Couldn't have put it better myself. Cheers!
While they did say we may drink as much as we'd like, please try not to have too much.
In a corner of the banquet hall, the Northern Parliament is having a small wine-tasting party.
Ah, Commander! Nice of you to stop by. Would you like to join us for a toast?
Didn't expect you to come around so soon, Comrade Commander.
It's funny. On the way here, Avrora kept repeating how she was so sure you'd show up at our table.
Hmm? I don't remember saying it THAT many times.
Either way – how about you take a seat and sip some wine with us?
It won't get us drunk because we're used to much stronger stuff, but it might just hit that sweet spot for you, Commander.
We won't force anything on you, of course. If you'd rather not drink at all, that's perfectly fine.
Oh, I just remembered – we still haven't changed into our dresses yet!
We got sidetracked as soon as we arrived. Gangut said she was "compelled" by the aroma in the air.
Then, the next thing I know, here we all are...
Clemenceau was very understanding, fortunately. She even sent extra wine our way.
Yeah, yeah. Let's rewind! We were talking about the Commander drinking with us – I know you want that, Avrora.
Yes, but if the Commander wishes to abstain, we must respect that choice.
So – would you like some wine, Commander?
That's the spirit!
Ahahahah! I knew you wouldn't say no!
Bottom's up, folks!~
You said it, comrade!~
See, Avrora? Comrade Commander is having a great time! You had nothing to worry about.
Ahahahaha! Now THAT'S how you drink! Keep it up, comrade!
All the world's sounds and pictures are getting hazy, fading...
How much have I drunk? I can't even remember...
That's enough now. The Commander is barely keeping it together.
Aww. Guess the fun's over. Avrora's got that look like she's not gonna budge.~
I'm surprised the Commander even drank with us for this long. Alas, all good things must come to an end.
Commander? Are you okay? Can you hear me?
"Wuh... Water..."
Water? No problem. It's a good thing I brought my canteen. Here you go.
Avrora produces a blurry canteen-thingy and hands it to me.
Uhh... The Commander just keeled over...
Commander! What's wrong?! Please wake up!
Avrora... This isn't water in the canteen! It's goddamn spirytus vodka!

sequence: The Orthodoxy's Banquet  The Wall at the Banquet's Center

The Wall at the Banquet's Center.say: "...Hm? A Juustagram notification?"
"...Hm? A Juustagram notification?"
"And it's from Prinz Eugen, too. Let's see what it is."
She sent me a picture. In it, she and her Iron Blood comrades are smiling, laughing, enjoying the banquet.
But, something is off about it.
Namely, a certain someone isn't in the picture.
At the center of the banquet venue is Bismarck, sitting all alone at a table, enjoying a drink.
As more and more guests have shown up, the banquet's atmosphere has gotten warmer and livelier.
And yet, that doesn't seem to extend to her. It's as though there's an invisible, people-repelling barrier around her.
The only ones who'll talk to her are fellow Iron Blood girls. Everyone else is keeping their distance from her.
I should go talk to her and ask what's up.
Oh. Good evening, Commander.
"Hey, Bismarck. Do you have a moment?"
Your expression tells me that you have something on your mind.
To answer you – yes, I do. I'm all ears.
Aha. I've figured out why that invisible barrier surrounds her.
Ah. "It's meant to be a relaxed banquet," right?
Yes, I suppose it is, to the majority of people.
To you as well, I... No, it's simply a fact – I'm objectively failing to blend in.
Unlike Eugen. Wherever she goes, the party spirit follows.
"Did you ask Eugen to be the star of the night, because you feel you dampen the mood?"
Have you seen her, by any chance? Is she spreading the fun?
"Yeah. She sent me a photo. I just wish you were in it, with the rest of them."
You know me, Commander. I'm not a party person. It doesn't come naturally to me.
As you speculated, I just rain on everyone's parade when I'm around.
That's why I asked Eugen to take the initiative.
Judging by how she's doing, it seems I made the right decision.
"Alright. Them aside, then, how are you enjoying the banquet?"
Who's to say I am, or have to? There are different kinds of banquets.
Some are for fun and drinking, others are more formal in nature and demand a serious approach.
As Iron Blood's leader, this banquet falls into the latter category for me.
"I don't think Eugen sent me that photo just to show she and the rest are having a good time. They're concerned about you."
First Eugen expresses concern about me, and now you.
She cracks a wry smile.
"Why don't you go join them? Then they wouldn't be concerned about you."
A good point...
Say... The orchestra is gearing up for the ball.
If you don't mind, would you like to go with me?
She offers me her hand. I take it.
Thank you for accepting my invitation. Let's do as you suggested and go enjoy this banquet.~

sequence: The Orthodoxy's Banquet  A Minute with Her Majesty

A Minute with Her Majesty.say: As much as I want to check out the venue, I feel that I should have a look around the palace.
Your Majesty! Look out!
A decorative vase placed dangerously to the edge of a desk threatens to fall over as Queen Elizabeth approaches. Sirius jumps in front of her and shields her with her own body.
Please be calm, Sirius. The inside of the palace is safe.
Mrmf! Mmgh!!
Oh, how clumsy of me! Please forgive me, Your Majesty!
*gasp*! What were you thinking? You nearly choked me with those huge knockers of yours!
Grrrr... Hmph!
My sincerest apologies. I shouldn't have held you so forcefully. Please give this naughty maid her due punishment!
"What's going on here?"
Why, if it isn't my servant.
Nothing is "going on" – except for Sirius being a klutz.
No matter. Your timing is perfect, servant. Come with me on a little stroll.
Good. Right this way.
Nonsense! What could possibly be more important than accompanying me, the queen?
Darn. Doesn't sound like I can't wriggle out of this one...
In the meantime, I shall prepare a beverage for after you finish your stroll.
Thanks, Bel.
Sirius, you go with her. She'll need your help.
But Your Majesty, you need an escort...
I'll be fine. The venue is safe, plus I have Sheffy watching over me from the shadows.
Well, if you're certain...
Shall I also prepare a light meal for you and my honourable Master while you're away?
There's quite some time before dinner, and I'd hate for you to be hungry until–
No need! There are hors d'oeuvres in the banquet hall. Moreover, the Iris Orthodoxy should be allowed to display its cooking knowledge today. The Royal Maids needn't do anything.
Elizabeth and I wander around the palace, admiring the sights and architecture.
Hmm... The Orthodoxy has done a respectable job with this banquet.
Although it's still only about 80% as good as the banquets we host.
"That's a specific estimate. You must have a keen, critical eye for these things."
I do. Let's imagine that we were hosting this banquet...
First of all, we wouldn't hang a painting on that wall. All the elements of the interior need to be in harmony, and...
With an excited tone, she points out a myriad of things they'd do differently. She seems to quite enjoy the act of critiquing.
Then, all of a sudden, she falls silent and deep in thought. I wonder why?
"You seem a bit restless. Did you dismiss Sirius and Belfast because you wanted to tell me something in private?"
What? No. I have nothing to tell you that I wouldn't if they were here.
Where did that come from? Are you pining for Sirius' cooking?
"She has improved – she can make chocolate and simple meals now – but no, that's not why I asked."
Ugh... Alright, if you really must know...
Look around you. People have been coming and going since I arrived.
And I've scarcely seen anyone with their subordinates in tow.
Richelieu doesn't have any assistants accompanying her, and neither do you.
That's what's normal at this banquet, and I simply wanted to experience this normalcy for myself.
Even if only for a little bit.
Just an ordinary shipgirl, not a queen, taking a stroll through this giant palace.
And with you for company.
"Is it 'normal' for me to follow you around?"
If I SAY it's normal, then it is!
Or what, do you think I don't mean it?
I'm confiding in you here, servant. I demand you take me seriously!
Otherwise, I can always get mad like a normal person and discipline you.
If you truly want my forgiveness, earn it.
Lucky for you, there's still some time before Bel comes back with that drink.
Until she does, think of something to appease me!~
What? Umm... By... By bemeaning you, or inflicting some light punishment...
I've got it! Something like what Ajax or Scylla would do.
Elizabeth's disturbing idea makes me stifle a laugh.
"To that, I say – it's not normal for a shipgirl to punish her Commander, is it?"
It's not? But I thought...
No matter! If you don't want to suffer, straighten out and look sharp!
Lucky for you, there's still some time before Bel comes back with that drink.
Until she does, think of something to appease me!~

sequence: And so, the festivity in the banquet venue reached its peak.

The Orthodoxy's Banquet II.say: You sure took your sweet time, servant!
Do you know what a banquet without you is? Dull, that's what!
I have to agree. We all missed you, Commander.~
Now, shall I get you something to drink?
I hope you enjoy the atmosphere as much as I do.
If ya see anything less than perfect, please try to ignore it...
Yeah, I know it's not my style to say "please," but still.
What I'm trying to say is – I hope you have a hell of a time tonight.
Commander! Can you feel the excitement in the air? I sure can!
This is only the start, though! Peak excitement will be when the performances start!~
Commander, thank you for always being here for us. You are the wind in our sails and the lighthouse that shows us the way.
...That sounded more wistful than I meant it to. Ahem.

sequence: The Orthodoxy's Banquet  Big E, the Fighter

Big E, the Fighter.say: Sometime later...
...And that's the speech. What are your thoughts, Commander?
"It's well thought-out and has good flow. It's impeccable – like you."
Thanks. I'm glad to hear you say that.
I thought it might be too formal. I know my way around the battlefield, but social gatherings are a different beast.
"I can empathize. Nobody wants to be that person who spoils the mood."
"Still, it's not necessarily bad if the speech feels formal. What matters is that it conveys a sincere message."
It's reassuring when you put it that way.
"And, in a way, if it does sound formal, it's because you see the banquet as a battlefield, and this speech symbolizes your determination to take it on."
That's... an interesting take. Didn't think you thought so too.
"Too?"
Yeah. Some of my friends have also compared the banquet hall to a battlefield.
Like Brooklyn. She said social spaces and warzones are the same at the end of the day.
"The comparison doesn't make much sense. Unless banquets became a life-or-death ordeal while I wasn't looking."
Heh, yeah. I guess it means social exchanges are complicated.
Either way, if the banquet is a battlefield, then I will fight. To the tune of my script, of course.
I guess that makes my dress my combat uniform. Wish I felt a little more comfortable in it, but there's no time for that now.
Enterprise's fighting spirit seems to ignite inside of her.
If I'm gonna go into battle...
Then, obviously, I need you behind my back, Commander.
What do say? Will you follow me?
Into the treacherous warzone that is the banquet?
"You already know the answer – gladly."

sequence: The Orthodoxy's Banquet  Dressed to Impress

Dressed to Impress.say: On the other end of Essex's room, the sound of rustling fabrics...
I-I'll be done in just a minute. Please don't turn around yet!
Aaand... there! Sheesh, putting a dress on without any help is a lot harder than I expected...
Wait, no! The thing just slipped! Ugh...
Okay... I'm ready now, Commander.
You can turn around now... and look at my dress!
Wh-what do you think?
Does it look good on me?
Really? You think so?
Although... I have mixed feelings about being "on par" with her...
Night and day, you say? I'm not sure what to make of that...
Sometimes, I just want to be told, "You look cute," or "You're pretty." That's not too much to ask...
She mutters something under her breath and turns on her heel. Still under the influence, she staggers and nearly trips over her herself.
Urgh... I feel dizzy. In hindsight, I really drank way too much...
Dang it, why is this stupid dress so long? It keeps getting in the way!
It's clear she's sobered up somewhat over the past fifteen or so minutes. That's a relief.
How, though? Sobering up takes longer than that, especially if you haven't eaten food or drank water.
Hey, Commander, could you help me over here?
I offer a hand to help her get her bearings straight.
Then, the next thing I know, she has wrapped her arms around mine and looks at me.
Hehehe... I got you nooow!
Pleeease, Commander. Can't you give me your honest opinion on how I look?
She squeezes my arm tightly. The wine must be empowering her – or at least encouraging her.
Hehe... Hehehe...
Words of praise... From the horse's mouth...
Even when I'm up against Enterprise, I'll try to look my best...
But... Her dress is really, really pretty... Hehehe...
Isn't that right... Commander?
She looks me in the eyes and flashes a soft smile.
Our faces are dangerously close to kissing distance. The smell of wine and her perfume tickles my nostrils.
Maybe it's just me... but you look even more attractive than usual tonight... ♪
My assumption was wrong. She has not sobered up at all.
There's no way I can let her roam the palace in her current state.
At the same time, I can't just leave her behind. I suppose I have to look after her for a while...

sequence: The Orthodoxy's Banquet  Hard Work is Rewarded

Hard Work is Rewarded.say: Musashi invites me onto a small boat. We'll follow the canal to get to the banquet.
Hmm? You have a curious expression on you.
Is it my kimono you're drawn to? It's my only one, at the moment.
Dressing appropriately for the banquet is a must... and for some reason, she decided to change into a more traditional outfit.
I'm sure you recognize it. It's what I wore at our pop-up café.~
It's one of the reserve garments I packed in case something happened. I didn't expect to actually use it.
But enough about me – I've heard you're not only a guest at the banquet, but also something of an organizer as well.
"You've heard correctly. Who told you that, though?"
No one. It was merely a deduction based on your character. You are someone we can always turn to for help with anything.
On top of you working all day, you just helped with that luggage. You must be quite exhausted, no?
Putting on a strong front for your subordinates is all fine and well. However...
You needn't do it for me.
Then come hither. Rest your weary bones.
No one can see us aboard this boat, much less interrupt.
You may seek comfort beside me without fear of being judged.
...No response? Is there something that prevents you from relaxing?
"Not really. My work for the day is done, so it's not that. It's just..."
There is no need for "justs." You deserve a break after a tiring day, simple as that.
Now, close your eyes.

sequence: Don't be nervous. Relax your muscles. *fluff fluff* ♥
Yes, just like that. Feels comfortable, no? Heehee.
I feel the fatigue leave my body – or is it my consciousness? It's hard to say...
*fluff fluff*...♥ *fluff fluff*...♥

Hard Work is Rewarded.say: A brief, relaxing eternity passes aboard the boat. It really was what I needed.

sequence: The Orthodoxy's Banquet  Don't Be Scared

Don't Be Scared.say: Jean Bart leads me arm-in-arm to a quiet place elsewhere inside the palace.
Phew... This place feels safe enough.
Didn't ya hear me earlier? I don't wanna be noticed.
"So you led me all this way to avoid attention? Sounds a bit excessive."
Not like I had any damn choice.
Yeah. I can't stand being around her. That's not the only reason, though.
*sigh*... Listen.
The shit Richelieu expects from me – the speech and all – I ain't cut out for it.
Forcing smiles, minding my manners, people staring at me like some painting...
I can't do it. I even told her that.
I know she's got her hands tied. Same with Clemenceau. Someone's gotta represent the Orthodoxy out there.
But that doesn't mean it HAS to be me.
Why not have Jeanne do it? Why not Marseillaise? They'd do much better than me.
"Maybe so, but the fact is that she entrusted YOU with the speech."
"And I can't imagine she did so just to make a fool of you."
Oh, for sure. She doesn't have bad intentions or anything.
If I had to guess, I think her goal is to get me used to being one of the Orthodoxy's representatives.
"So you understand where she's coming from. Then why did you run?"
"Okay. Here's what we'll do: I'll try to convince Richelieu to replace you with Jeanne so you don't have to–"
No.
I'm still gonna do it. I already said I would. I'm a Templar Knight, dammit – I don't back down.
"Then I have to ask again – why DID you run?"
Do I really gotta spell it out?
I'm not denyin' I'm nervous about it, but the Orthodoxy's reputation matters more than a bit of discomfort.
Jean Bart being upfront about her feelings is a rare and welcome sight. I can think of only one thing to say here.
"I believe in you."
Thanks. I appreciate it.
Anyway... 'bout time we head back now.
I ran away from Massachusetts without sayin' a word. Oughta go and formally apologize to her.
"That's a tall order right out of the gate. Do you want me to help? Chime in when you need it, maybe?"
Nah. I've gotta face my fears on my own. No two ways about it.
Besides, I haven't got the time to psych myself up.
So I just gotta do it – find Massachusetts and say sorry.
Also... I know it's a lot to ask, but...
You'll stick with me until it's time, won't you?

sequence: The Orthodoxy's Banquet  The Blackout Nightmare
'How long have I been out? I still have a mission to do...'
'Dammit... Brain fog makes it impossible to think...'
'Guess the sleeping med hasn't worn off yet...'

The Blackout Nightmare.say: I get the picture now. Continue with the job.
I'll say this one last time – bring 'em back ALIVE. Got it?
A figure I can only assume is Avrora barks out an order, then turns her attention to me.
Heh. You're finally awake. That was earlier than I expected.
Better that way. The soon this is over with, the sooner I can send you away.
Now spit it out. Tell me everything you know.
What was that? Are you playing dumb with me, or are you still drugged out?
Of course you don't. Like you don't all tell me that every single day.
Doesn't matter. I didn't expect you to spill the beans just because I asked nicely.
Since you didn't want to do this the easy way, we'll do it the hard way.
Let's see how much pain it takes to make you squeal. Hehehe...
"Avrora, no! Stop!"
Wait a second. Avrora would never say or do anything like this!
The only answer is...
The second the thought forms in my head, my surroundings start to fade out, like a light being dimmed.
The world is once more engulfed in a confused, groggy darkness.
Oh? So you know my name. That means there's a rat in our ranks.~
Thanks for the tip. That gives me two cans of beans to crack open.
"I don't care what you do to me! I'm not telling you a damn thing!"
"My secrets... will die with me!"
Hah! Been long since I dealt with someone with an actual backbone. Now you've got me excited.~
I'm gonna enjoy finding out how long you'll last. Hehehe.
"AAAAHHHH!"
Cry! Scream! Eat this goddamn piroshki!~
Oh dear... The Commander is tossing and turning.
Maybe a lap pillow wasn't the brightest idea. My legs are getting numb...
Although... This is the least I can do, after that blunder.
"Avrora! Stop!"
*gasp*! St-stop what?
What kind of awful dream did you have?

sequence: The Orthodoxy's Banquet  Finally Letting Loose

Finally Letting Loose.say: After enjoying a dance in the ballroom, Bismarck and I went to the theater room to view some performances.
That jazz number was very novel compared to the classical music I'm familiar with.
The same melody played with different instruments can produce an entirely new-feeling song.
Oh, you brought refreshments? Thank you, Commander.
"No problem. I hope they're to your liking."
They look delicious. Let me try one.
In her typical elegant and formal fashion, she picks up a pastry and takes a bite.
Delicious, and with a distinct mouthfeel.
"So, how do you feel about the banquet now? You seem to be enjoying yourself."
You could say that. The general vibe has changed a little with you around.
"Is it no longer formal and demanding of a serious approach, as you said earlier?"
...Yes. I suppose this situation calls for a party-person mindset.
It's rare that I get the chance to actually enjoy a banquet. It's partly due to who I am as a person.
Most of the time, I approach celebrations as a leader – formally, and moderately. It's a lot like a job, really.
Even when the chance presents itself for me to let loose, I can't get completely comfortable.
And let's be fair, neither can you. If you receive an important message, you need to respond immediately.
Then, suddenly, your guard is up and you can't enjoy the taste of good food or appreciate the sound of a great song.
"It doesn't have to be that way. The Iron Blood can handle one day without you at the helm."
Oh, to leave my work at the door and enjoy the moment with my friends...
I wish I could. But I have my duties.
"If something urgent does crop up, you can simply ask someone else to take care of it. That includes me."
You're right. I suppose I could briefly hang up my hat and rely on you.
...Alright. I'll take you up on your offer.
I'll do as you say and enjoy this banquet without worrying about what-ifs.
"I really hope you'll have the time of your life tonight."
I will, with you by my side.

sequence: The Orthodoxy's Banquet  A Toast to Our Host

A Toast to Our Host.say: After finishing my stroll around the palace with Elizabeth, I return to the banquet hall, where I find someone waiting for me.
Master, I've been asked to forward a message to you from Her Majesty. I urge you to read it at once.
She hands me an ornate card, embellished with royal iconography.
In short, it tells me to come to a certain numbered room.
By the time I finish reading and look up, Sheffield is gone. I infer this to mean I should come alone.
Beyond the numbered door is a big room, furnished in typical Royal Navy fashion.
Its lavishness rivals that of Elizabeth's own royal chamber. It's almost hard to believe a room like this exists within this palace.
At the center of the room is a dining table. On the other end of it, Elizabeth sits by herself.
Welcome, Master. Her Majesty is waiting for you.
Took you long enough, servant!
"Sorry, I don't know this palace so I got lost for a while. That aside, very luxurious place you have here."
You mean this VIP room?
Of course it is. Elites such as me deserve elite treatment. I'm sure they provided Bismarck with something equally opulent.
"I take it you're done experiencing normalcy, then?"
I've enjoyed it enough for a while.
Belfast gestures at me, then shows me to my seat at the table.
Take a seat.
Reckon you still have room in your stomach?
"I might. Did the Royal Maids prepare the whole feast you have here?"
No, only the tea, courtesy of Bel. Everything else is from the Orthodoxy's kitchen.
It's the same as what they're serving in the banquet hall. If you're not hungry, you may pass.
"It might be the same food, but the experience is different. It surely affects the taste when you eat in a queen's opulent room, per her invitation."
Well, well! You can be charming from time to time.
My dinner with Elizabeth is pleasant.
The mood is quiet, relaxing, and feels like it's another world compared to the hustle and bustle of the banquet hall.
Leaning back to admire my surroundings, I notice something strange – while my cup contains tea, Elizabeth's seems to contain wine.
Wondering why you don't get any wine, do you? Because you need to stay sober until the main event.
As for why I'M drinking wine... I just wanted something different.
Let's not forget that the Orthodoxy is famous for its wine.
Furthermore, Richelieu put a great deal of thought into her selection.
She hand-picked different vintage brands to match each guest's preferences, you see. And she did a marvellous job.
She takes a sip from her cup of wine and savors it with all the elegance befitting a queen.
As I've said many times already, the Orthodoxy really did a remarkable job with this banquet.
Everything is spotless, from the general gist to the fine details.
But what do you think, servant? Have you been enjoying yourself?
"Absolutely. I've not once felt anything could've been better."
Good to hear. We're in agreement.
Right then, I hear a ring on my communicator. It's an invitation.
Must be from Richelieu. Seems you never have a moment to rest, eh?
Go. She's waiting for you.
Don't worry about me. I've had you to myself enough for one day. Plus, I'm a little tipsy, so I should stay and rest.
If you would, Master, please follow me.
Belfast leads me to the door. As I leave, I overhear Elizabeth whispering something to herself.
The Orthodoxy can have this one victory.
It's their banquet, after all. It'd be rude of us to steal their thunder.
Enjoy the celebration now, servant.

The Orthodoxy's Banquet III.say: Schedule-wise, the banquet should be nearing its climax now.
In reality, though, spirits are still rising – both of the soul, and of the bottle.
I know you can hold your liquor, Comrade Commander. Don't be a teetotaler and drink up!
Don't you worry. My canteen actually contains water this time... or does it? Heehee~
Not again, servant! Stop letting the drunkards sink their claws into you!
The Commander certainly is popular. For better or worse...
What do you say we walk over and snatch the Commander for ourselves, Lady Musashi?
No. Only a fool gets between two fighting tigers to steal their prey.
Let us wait for a more opportune time, when the Commander needs external help.
And be vigilant. We aren't the only ones who want a piece of the Commander.
Well, fellow hunters, that might take a while. Let's pass the time with some of our domestically-produced beer, shall we?
Whew... Finally, a moment to breathe. Enjoying yourself, Jean?
Yeah. Not a bad party, I guess. You, uh... wanna share a toast?
Why, I'd love to. To a long and eventful night!
Heeey, Enterprise... You like the refreshments? I do, and I could use some more!
*hic*... Commander... C'mere, I wanna talk! Ahaha...
For god's sake, Essex... Go easy on the drinks. People are looking.
My gut told me that things would get a little TOO rowdy if I stayed in the hall, so I decided to step outside for a while.
Fortunately, nobody saw me sneaking out. I'd hate for it to look like I'm bailing on everyone.
I look up at the night sky, the laughter and cheering from inside the hall still ringing in my ears. It's like a battlefield in there.
I take a deep breath of fresh air. This is just what I needed.
Well, well. Going outside right before the clock strikes midnight.
Needed a break, I presume? That's why I'm here, too.
"I recognize that voice... Clemenceau?"
Do forgive me if I'm disrupting the moment.
Alright. If you're sure.
*sniff sniff*...
The girls in there really left their mark on you, didn't they?
I can smell perfume residue all over you. Iron Blood, Sakura Empire, Iris Orthodoxy... There's a little bit from everyone.
It must be exhausting, being passed around from faction to faction like a volleyball.
Maybe I should rub some of my scent off on you as well, hmm?
"Might the words 'have mercy on me' convince you not to?"
Heehee. I was only joking.
"Fair enough. By the way, you look a little worn out. Is it that taxing to oversee a banquet and speak to guests?"
It is. I'm very much not a people person.
Nor am I a party person. I'm not much for clinking glasses and engaging in warm conversations – I like my drinks with a side of sea breeze and solitude.
Besides, with Richelieu on the scene, nobody will notice if I'm gone.
...I'm curious, Commander. How do you feel about our banquet?
Yes, typical. I think so too.
The celebrations we throw at this port feel normal and commonplace, in the best way.
They're symbols of the calm, peaceful life we enjoy, and the normality we strive to maintain.
Heehee. I feel like I know you better now than I did before.~
"It was a lot of work, but I'm having a great time."
But, it was worth it. As far as entertaining the guests is concerned, this banquet is perfect.
You deserve acknowledgment for your part, too. This banquet wouldn't be what it is without you.
Thrilling, you say? Interesting... Perhaps there are things beyond even my predictions going on in there.
Seems you navigate parties like you navigate the battlefield. I feel like I know you a little better now.
Alright, we've both had enough fresh air. It's time to lead you to the next battlefront.
"The next battlefront? Meaning...?"
When this palace was built, we had a few secret passageways and hidden rooms constructed as well.
Think of it as an exploratory detour. You won't be disappointed.
Come on. Let's enjoy this party to the end – together.

sequence: 今日は特別な日、記念すべき日
……なので、パーティーをしましょう！

パーティー・ヴィズ・アイリスⅠ.say: アイリスの同胞たち、準備の進捗報告をお願いします
来場者用通路の警備担当の振り分けが終わりました。今は念のため再確認をしていますわ
こちらも似たような感じです。次の作業を待機中です
ダンスをする子たちのリハーサルが終わったわ
パーティー・ヴィズ・アイリスⅠ.actorName: エミール・ベルタン [ゴールデン・ダンス]

パーティー・ヴィズ・アイリスⅠ.say: 演奏する子たちも楽器の準備が終わった。もう少ししたら配置につくよ
パーティー・ヴィズ・アイリスⅠ.actorName: ヴォークラン [シンフォニック・オートマタ？]

パーティー・ヴィズ・アイリスⅠ.say: 飲食物の準備も滞りなく。ですが……

ほろ酔いの後輩空母.say: パーティー会場の様子も気になるが、やっぱり一度場外も見回ろう。
周りから誰かの視線を感じた。
なんとなく気配を辿ってみると、その視線の主を見つけることができた。
エンタープライズ先輩……ドレス姿がすごく似合っていますね…
……ごくごく……ふぅ……
エセックスは遠くからエンタープライズのドレス姿を眺めながら、豪快にワインをラッパ飲みしているようだ。
あんなの……勝てるわけないじゃないです……か～！
エセックスは一体何をしているんだろう？
し、指揮官！どどどうしてこんなところに！？
それより私がさっき言ったこと……聞きました？
忘れて……早く忘れてください……
ふぅ……そうですか……あれ、私、さっき何て言ってましたっけ……

うぅ……指揮官、知っていますか？
実は私、エンタープライズ先輩の着替えを手伝ったんですよ
だってエンタープライズ先輩、こういうの苦手じゃないですか……
指揮官に会った時に、先輩は「時間がかかった」ってちょっと照れたように言ってましたよね？
そこで、私、わかりました！……（ごくごく）
指揮官にもわかりますよね！？
エセックスは急に手に持っているワインボトルをテーブルにドンっと置いて、改めてこちらを見つめてきた。
一体どういう話だ……？
指揮官ったらとぼけちゃってぇ…
ほら、いつもかっこいい先輩がもっと……もう私勝てないなって思って…
もう、ドレスに着替えなくてもいいかなって思って……
なんとなくエセックスが落ち込む理由が分かった…ような気がする。

とりあえずこれ以上彼女が酔い潰れないように相手しておこう。
エセックスが戦わずして負けを認めるのはらしくない。

……！そ、そうですね。戦う前に負けを認めるなんて…
ドレス対決……エンタープライズ先輩相手でも絶対に負けませんっ！

ほんのちょっとだけ、エセックスの酔いが醒めたように見えた。
で……では早速部屋に戻りましょう。指揮官も来てください！
指揮官ったらとぼけちゃってぇ…
でしたらそんな指揮官の期待を裏切らないためにも……最高のドレス姿を見せないとっ！
だから……一緒に部屋に戻ってドレスに着替えるに決まっているじゃないですか！
こんな状態のエセックスに抵抗できるはずがない……
というわけで、無理矢理にエセックスに付き合わされてしまった――

あ、指揮官もいらしたのですね。一緒に一杯どうです？
こんなに早く合流できるなんて、同志指揮官はやはり持っているな
よかったなアヴローラ。誰かさんは何度も同志指揮官と一緒に飲めたら…って言ってたじゃないか
んー？私そんなこと言いました？
まあ、そんなことより――同志指揮官、せっかくだからこのアイリスのワインをどうだ？
ガツンとはこないから北方連合の私たちにはイマイチだが、同志指揮官にはちょうどいいかもな
指揮官、無理に付き合うことはないですよ。断っても構いませんわ
というのも、本当はみんなこの時間にドレスに着替えているはずなんですが……
ここに着いた途端、ワインの香りに誘われたガングートに「付き合わされてしまった」んです
それであれよあれよという間にこんなことに…
わざわざ追加のワインまで届けてくれるなんて、クレマンソーが気を利かせてくれて助かりましたわ
またまた～！アヴローラだって同志指揮官と飲みたかったくせに～
それはそうですけど、指揮官の意志を尊重するのが前提ですよ
というわけで…指揮官？
さすが同志指揮官、良い飲みっぷりだ！
あはははは！そうこなくちゃ！
どんどんいくぞー！
ははは、その勢いで存分に楽しもう！
心配するな。アヴローラさん、指揮官も楽しんでいるじゃないか！
あははははは、いいぞ！同志もいけるクチだな！もっとだ！
景色と声が…遠のいていく…
どれほど飲んだか…もう忘れた……
はい、ここまで。指揮官はもうふらふらですよ
残念だが…アヴローラに真顔で言われては仕方ないか
同志指揮官がここまで付き合ってくれるとは思わなかったな。そろそろこの辺にしておこう
指揮官？…指揮官？私の声が聞こえていますか…？
み、水…
はい、お水ですね。あ。ちょうど「アレ」持っているので、どうぞ
アヴローラから水筒っぽいなにか何かを手渡された。
同志…ぶっ倒れてしまったな…
指揮官！指揮官っ！しっかりしてください！
待って。アヴローラさん…これって水じゃなくスピリタスじゃないか！

sequence: パーティー・ウィズ・アイリス  会場真ん中の壁

会場真ん中の壁.say: パーティー会場の様子も気になるが、やっぱり一度場外も見回ろう。
……ん？艦船通信のメッセージ？
プリンツ・オイゲンからメッセージが届いたようだ。
写真が添付されている――楽しく遊んでいる鉄血のメンバーたちだ。
でも気になるのは……
その写真に、いるべきはずの「彼女」がいないのだ――
会場の真ん中のエリアで、ビスマルクが一人で飲み物を嗜んでいた。
会場にやって来た仲間たちが増えるにつれ、パーティーもますます盛り上がりを見せているが…
しかしビスマルクには、まるで見えない壁で阻まれているように、誰も話しかけて来ないようだ。
各陣営の指導者や鉄血の艦船たちはともかく、それ以外の仲間たちはその「壁」に邪魔されたかのように中々近寄れない。
なんとかしてあげなければ――
ああ、指揮官か。こんばんは
会場真ん中の壁.actorName: ビスマルク [鉄血の威光]

会場真ん中の壁.say: ビスマルクからこの状況について上手く聞き出す方法は……
その顔、何か相談事があるようね
会場真ん中の壁.actorName: ビスマルク [鉄血の威光]

会場真ん中の壁.say: ちょうど時間があるから、卿から話してくれて構わないわ
会場真ん中の壁.actorName: ビスマルク [鉄血の威光]

会場真ん中の壁.say: 「卿」――とりあえず「壁」の正体が分かった。
楽しいパーティー…ね
会場真ん中の壁.actorName: ビスマルク [鉄血の威光]

会場真ん中の壁.say: 確かに、大多数の仲間にとってそうかもしれない
会場真ん中の壁.actorName: ビスマルク [鉄血の威光]

会場真ん中の壁.say: そして指揮官から見て――いいえ、客観的に見ても、私は中々溶け込めてないのね
会場真ん中の壁.actorName: ビスマルク [鉄血の威光]

会場真ん中の壁.say: これがオイゲンなら、すぐ楽しみ方を見つけられるわ
会場真ん中の壁.actorName: ビスマルク [鉄血の威光]

会場真ん中の壁.say: ビスマルクがいるとみんな畏まってしまうから、仲間をオイゲンに任せたのだろう。
ところで、そのオイゲンはどうだった？楽しんでいる？
会場真ん中の壁.actorName: ビスマルク [鉄血の威光]

会場真ん中の壁.say: オイゲンから送られた写真を思い出す。そこにビスマルクもいればもっと良かった。
あなたも知っているでしょう…私はパーティーでもお堅く映ってしまうタイプよ
会場真ん中の壁.actorName: ビスマルク [鉄血の威光]

会場真ん中の壁.say: 皆と一緒にいると、場の雰囲気が重くなるだけ
会場真ん中の壁.actorName: ビスマルク [鉄血の威光]

会場真ん中の壁.say: だからオイゲンにみんなの引率を頼んだ
会場真ん中の壁.actorName: ビスマルク [鉄血の威光]

会場真ん中の壁.say: この状況を見る限り、どうやら私の判断は正しかったようね
会場真ん中の壁.actorName: ビスマルク [鉄血の威光]

会場真ん中の壁.say: 鉄血の仲間たちはいいが、ビスマルクはどうやって楽しむんだ…？
パーティーと言っても雰囲気はそれぞれよ
会場真ん中の壁.actorName: ビスマルク [鉄血の威光]

会場真ん中の壁.say: 思いっきりはしゃぐものもあれば、引き締めて、真面目に挑むべきものものもあるわ
会場真ん中の壁.actorName: ビスマルク [鉄血の威光]

会場真ん中の壁.say: そして指導者の私にとって、このパーティーは……
会場真ん中の壁.actorName: ビスマルク [鉄血の威光]

会場真ん中の壁.say: ただ仲間たちとはしゃぐ様子を見せるためだけで、オイゲンが写真を送ってきたとは思えない。

会場真ん中の壁.actorName: ビスマルク [鉄血の威光]

会場真ん中の壁.say: オイゲンだけでなく、指揮官にまで心配をかけたわね
会場真ん中の壁.actorName: ビスマルク [鉄血の威光]

会場真ん中の壁.say: ビスマルクは申し訳なさそうに苦笑した。
心配をかけたくないなら、仲間たちと同じように気楽にパーティーを楽しもう。
そうね……
会場真ん中の壁.actorName: ビスマルク [鉄血の威光]

会場真ん中の壁.say: ダンスホールで音楽の演奏が始まったみたい
会場真ん中の壁.actorName: ビスマルク [鉄血の威光]

会場真ん中の壁.say: 指揮官、もしよければ――
会場真ん中の壁.actorName: ビスマルク [鉄血の威光]

会場真ん中の壁.say: 差し出されたビスマルクの手を取る。
誘いに乗ってくれてありがとう。それでは――パーティーを楽しみましょうか
会場真ん中の壁.actorName: ビスマルク [鉄血の威光]

sequence: パーティー・ウィズ・アイリス  小さな陛下との一時

小さな陛下との一時.say: 会場の廊下を歩いていると…思いがけず飾ってある花瓶を床に落としそうになった…！
陛下、お気を付けくださいっ！
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: シリアス [ホワイトローズ]

小さな陛下との一時.say: とっさに廊下の向こうにいるシリアスが身を挺して、エリザベスに覆いかぶさった。
シリアス、会場内は安全ですので、そう緊張しなくても大丈夫ですよ
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: ベルファスト [優雅にして高貴な従者]

小さな陛下との一時.say: ん、んんぅー！
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス [女王さまの舞踏会]

小さな陛下との一時.say: あっ、大変失礼いたしました！陛下、申し訳ございません！
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: シリアス [ホワイトローズ]

小さな陛下との一時.say: んはーー！！…危うく窒息しそうに…シリアス！なんでそんなに巨乳を押しつけてくるのよ！
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス [女王さまの舞踏会]

小さな陛下との一時.say: ぐぬぬぬ…ふん！
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス [女王さまの舞踏会]

小さな陛下との一時.say: 緊張で力加減が分からなくなってしまい、申し訳ありません！どうかこの卑しいメイドに罰を――
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: シリアス [ホワイトローズ]

小さな陛下との一時.say: …とりあえず花瓶を台座に戻そう。
なによ。下僕じゃない
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス [女王さまの舞踏会]

小さな陛下との一時.say: ただシリアスが緊張で大げさなだけよ。別に心配はいらないわ
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス [女王さまの舞踏会]

小さな陛下との一時.say: それよりちょうどいいわ！下僕、少し散策に付き合いなさい！
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス [女王さまの舞踏会]

小さな陛下との一時.say: さあ、ついてきて！
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス [女王さまの舞踏会]

小さな陛下との一時.say: なによ！女王である私に付き合うことより重要なことなんてあるわけ？
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス [女王さまの舞踏会]

小さな陛下との一時.say: 女王陛下の命令に従うしかないようだ……
では散策後の疲れを癒すための飲み物を用意してまいります
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: ベルファスト [優雅にして高貴な従者]

小さな陛下との一時.say: ありがとうベル、頼むわ
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス [女王さまの舞踏会]

小さな陛下との一時.say: ベルだけだと大変だから、シリアスも手伝ってあげて
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス [女王さまの舞踏会]

小さな陛下との一時.say: し、しかし陛下、護衛なしでは……
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: シリアス [ホワイトローズ]

小さな陛下との一時.say: 大丈夫よ。この会場から出ないし、シェフィも陰でついてきてもらっているわ
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス [女王さまの舞踏会]

小さな陛下との一時.say: そういうことでしたら…かしこまりました
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: シリアス [ホワイトローズ]

小さな陛下との一時.say: 陛下、そして誇らしきご主人さま、よければシリアスが軽食をご用意させていただいてもよろしいでしょうか？
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: シリアス [ホワイトローズ]

小さな陛下との一時.say: ディナーの時間までまだ時間があります。お腹を空かせないように――
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: シリアス [ホワイトローズ]

小さな陛下との一時.say: け、結構よ！パーティー会場にはオードブルが置いてあるの。それに今日はアイリスの腕前を拝見する予定なんだから、メイド隊は何も作らなくていいわ！
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス [女王さまの舞踏会]

小さな陛下との一時.say: エリザベスと二人っきり、お城風のパーティー会場を散策する。
ふーん…アイリス主催のパーティーもなかなかサマになっているじゃない
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス [女王さまの舞踏会]

小さな陛下との一時.say: と言っても、せいぜいロイヤルの八割ってとこかしら
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス [女王さまの舞踏会]

小さな陛下との一時.say: 今日のエリザベスも平常運転のようだ。
そうね。もしロイヤル主催だったら…
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス [女王さまの舞踏会]

小さな陛下との一時.say: そこの壁を絵画で飾るのではなく、インテリア全体のバランスを考えてこう…
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス [女王さまの舞踏会]

小さな陛下との一時.say: 一見あれこれと注文を付けているようだが、エリザベスはとてもノリノリで――いつもよりはしゃいでいるように感じてしまうほどだ。
かと思いきや、今度は何か考えこんだ様子で、口を噤んでしまった。
よくよく観察すると、メイド隊を人払いしてから若干落ち着きないようだ。
い、言いたいこと？別に特にないわ。メイド隊に聞かれてダメなことなんてないし
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス [女王さまの舞踏会]

小さな陛下との一時.say: それともあんた、もしかしてシリアスの作ったものを食べたいの…？
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス [女王さまの舞踏会]

小さな陛下との一時.say: 流石にそれはない――いや、シリアスは頑張ってチョコと軽食は作れるようになった気が…
もう……この馬鹿下僕、私をどんだけ困らせるのよ…
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス [女王さまの舞踏会]

小さな陛下との一時.say: 周りを見てみなさい。いろいろ回ってきたけど
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス [女王さまの舞踏会]

小さな陛下との一時.say: 部下とか側近とか連れまわしている子なんてほとんどいないでしょ？
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス [女王さまの舞踏会]

小さな陛下との一時.say: ――主催者のリシュリューだけじゃなく、あんたも連れていないのに、私だけ連れてたら変じゃない
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス [女王さまの舞踏会]

小さな陛下との一時.say: まあ要するに、「普通」とやらを体験してみたかっただけよ！
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス [女王さまの舞踏会]

小さな陛下との一時.say: 少しだけでも…
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス [女王さまの舞踏会]

小さな陛下との一時.say: 女王としてではなく、ただの一隻の艦船であるクイーン・エリザベスとして、この大きなお城を散歩して……
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス [女王さまの舞踏会]

小さな陛下との一時.say: もちろん、あんただけを連れてね！
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス [女王さまの舞踏会]

小さな陛下との一時.say: 指揮官を連れ回す「普通」とは……
私が「普通」と言えば「普通」なの！
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス [女王さまの舞踏会]

小さな陛下との一時.say: 今もしかして私が冗談で言ってるとか思った？
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス [女王さまの舞踏会]

小さな陛下との一時.say: せっかく下僕と二人っきりになったのに……本気で付き合わないなら怒るわよ！
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス [女王さまの舞踏会]

小さな陛下との一時.say: そう！それも「普通」に怒って、あんたに色んなことを――
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス [女王さまの舞踏会]

小さな陛下との一時.say: 怒ってほしくないなら行動で示してちょうだい！
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス [女王さまの舞踏会]

小さな陛下との一時.say: ほら、ベルが飲み物を持ってくるまでまだ時間があるし…
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス [女王さまの舞踏会]

小さな陛下との一時.say: それまではなんとかして私を喜ばせなさい！ふん！
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス [女王さまの舞踏会]

小さな陛下との一時.say: そ、そうね……下僕をどうしつける…じゃなくてどう怒ってやろうかしら…
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス [女王さまの舞踏会]

小さな陛下との一時.say: そう！エイジャックスやシラみたいに………
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス [女王さまの舞踏会]

小さな陛下との一時.say: 恐ろしげな発想に思わず笑ってしまいそうになった。
というか、そもそも艦船が指揮官をしつけるのは「普通」なのか……？
ふ、「普通」じゃないの……？
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス [女王さまの舞踏会]

小さな陛下との一時.say: とにかく！しつけられたくなければ、突っ立ってないでよね！
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス [女王さまの舞踏会]

小さな陛下との一時.say: ほら、ベルが飲み物を持ってくるまでまだ時間があるし…
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス [女王さまの舞踏会]

小さな陛下との一時.say: それまではなんとかして私を喜ばせなさい！ふん！
小さな陛下との一時.actorName: クイーン・エリザベス [女王さまの舞踏会]

sequence: パーティーはクライマックスを迎え……

パーティー・ヴィズ・アイリスⅡ.say: あら、我らが指揮官の登場ね
もう下僕、待たせるじゃない！
こんな豪華なパーティーに下僕がいないなんて…楽しくないじゃない！
そうですね～。指揮官がいませんとみんな寂しがりますよ
よかったらお飲み物をお持ちしましょうか？
もうみんな盛り上がっているわ。指揮官
こういう雰囲気は…悪くない。指揮官も楽しんでいくといい
至らないところがあったら、大目に見てくれ。…はぁ
オレがこんなセリフを言うのはらしくない？それは…そうだが…
ふっ、お前がさせたようなものだ。引き続き楽しんでいってくれ
指揮官！私もみんなとパーティーを楽しんでいます！
まだまだ盛り上がりそうですね！このあとはどんなイベントがあるんでしょう？
どんなものだろうと、指揮官が一緒にいてくれて、導いてくれれば問題ないさ。
…と、このパーティーへの発言としては重苦しすぎたな
とにかく特別な日、記念すべき日だ――指揮官、おめでとう

sequence: パーティー・ウィズ・アイリス  どこまでもエンタープライズらしく

どこまでもエンタープライズらしく.say: しばらく経って――
…と、こんな感じだが、指揮官はどう思う？
どこまでもエンタープライズらしく.actorName: エンタープライズ [英雄の儀典礼装]

どこまでもエンタープライズらしく.say: 理路整然としてよくまとまっていて、エンタープライズらしい。
